summary: The user is seeking new book recommendations and has set a goal to read 10 books in a month. They discuss their recent book club experience with "The Hate U Give" by Angie Thomas, highlighting themes of systemic racism and activism, and express interest in "The Power" by Naomi Alderman and "The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo" by Taylor Jenkins Reid.
facts: The user has set a goal to read 10 books in a month. The user recently started a book club with friends from work. The user discussed "The Hate U Give" by Angie Thomas in their book club. The user found the themes of systemic racism and police brutality in "The Hate U Give" to be relevant today. The user reflected on their own biases and privileges during the discussion of "The Hate U Give." The user is considering reading "The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo" by Taylor Jenkins Reid for their book club. The user appreciates engaging and easy-to-follow writing styles in books. The user has heard great things about "The Power" by Naomi Alderman. The user has read "The Silent Patient" by Alex Michaelides and found it to be a page-turner.
